active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: K5 benchmark governance and promotion decision bundle: phase-17 repair smoke is diagnostic/non-promotion evidence; phase-18 must separate LME and LoCoMo, source metrics and judged quality, valid and invalid artifacts, and kernel-off default behavior.

current_phase_objective: Produce a governed promotion/hold/continue decision from real MemoryOS v3 public benchmark evidence without hiding LoCoMo source-grounding regressions or treating same-slice repair smoke as promotion.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: If product or test code changes are proposed, add RED coverage first for the exact governance gap: invalid artifact quarantine, source-miss judge-pass accounting, same-case movement comparison, or kernel-default-off protection.
If the phase is governance-only with no product behavior change, case-level benchmark evidence and artifact-validation checks are the RED evidence; do not invent demo-only tests.

benchmark_and_smoke_commands.structural_lme5: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase18_lme5_structural --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
benchmark_and_smoke_commands.structural_locomo5: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --run-id phase18_locomo5_structural --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
benchmark_and_smoke_commands.milestone_lme50: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 50 --run-id phase18_lme50_<timestamp>
benchmark_and_smoke_commands.milestone_locomo50: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 50 --run-id phase18_locomo50_<timestamp>

usable_ack_checklist: ACK phase equals phase-18 and ack_level is usable.
Active goal is cited in dispatch, result, review_verdict, and ack.
Context bundle is cited by plan, execute, and review artifacts.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo are reported separately when milestone evidence is used.

Case-level fail-to-pass, pass-to-fail, unchanged fail, retrieval miss, evidence-hit-answer-fail, source-miss judge-pass, context missing evidence, unsupported answer, and judge-questionable rows are visible.
Invalid partial, projected, heartbeat-only, stale, or mismatched artifacts are quarantined.
No same-slice repair smoke is used as promotion evidence.
v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel default-off are preserved.
Review verdict passes and review_eval_decision.promotion_gate is satisfied or not_applicable.
Decision is evidence-bound: continue_targeted, expand_eval, hold, or promote_blueprint.
review_focus: Whether LME/LoCoMo and LLM answer/judge were routed correctly under the Review Eval Autonomy Policy.
Whether same-slice repair smoke was kept diagnostic-only.
Whether kernel default remained off and v1 fallback remained explicit.
Whether context bundle coverage was honored by all lane outputs.
